authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
USDA Forest Service (Sierra National Forest, John Muir Wilderness)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(99) — Mono Creek (Fresno Co.) and tributaries
sources.quotedText: (99) Mono Creek (Fresno Co.) and tributaries from Edison Lake upstream to the confluence with the North Fork Mono Creek. Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 5 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Mono Creek – opportunity for a grand slam | Fly Fishing the Sierra
sources.quotedText: The main fork of Mono Creek just above Edison Lake has Browns in the 8-10 inch class with some up to 12". As you go further upstream, you will encounter more Rainbows.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 267025, "Mono Creek", Stream, CA, Fresno Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":267025,"gaz_name":"Mono Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Fresno","objectid_1":72428,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13255012.0481, 4488737.0325 → 37.35523°N, 119.07180°W). Corrects prior file coordinates (-119.0000, 37.4000), which were suspiciously round numbers roughly 8 km northeast of the actual GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull; corroborated by proximity (~5 km) to the Mono Hot Springs populated place (GNIS gaz_id 1659156, 37.32661°N, 119.01763°W), near which Mono Creek meets the South Fork San Joaquin River.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30, on the reach from Edison Lake upstream to the confluence with North Fork Mono Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit.

parameters.note: This special regulation applies only to the reach of Mono Creek and its tributaries from Edison Lake (Lake Thomas A. Edison) upstream to the confluence with the North Fork Mono Creek.

regulations.humanSummary: Special regulation applies from Edison Lake upstream to the confluence with North Fork Mono Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Mono Creek (Fresno Co.) and tributaries from Edison Lake upstream to the confluence with the North Fork Mono Creek.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
